item.title: About Me
item.description:
I am a multi-disciplinary engineer and analyst specializing in the design, optimization, and administration of scalable data infrastructure. Holding degrees spanning Computer Science, Biochemistry, and Commerce, alongside advanced qualifications in accounting (CPA), I approach data challenges with a unique dual lens: rigorous technical engineering combined with a deep understanding of corporate and financial workflows.

My engineering philosophy centers on building idempotent, resilient, and self-healing data systems. I focus on transforming raw, unorganized data streams into highly optimized, production-ready storage architectures that drive reliable business intelligence and automated decision-making.
